Mixed martial arts events
2008 in Shooto
Information
First dateJanuary 26, 2008
Last dateDecember 13, 2008
Events
Total events22
Fights
Total fights171
Title fights6
Chronology
2007 in Shooto 2008 in Shooto 2009 in Shooto

The year 2008 is the 20th year in the history of Shooto, a mixed martial arts promotion based in Japan. In 2008 Shooto held 22 events beginning with, Shooto: Back To Our Roots 7.

Title fights

[edit]
Title fights in 2008
Weight class Method Round Time Event Notes
Featherweight Hideki Kadowaki def. Akitoshi Tamura (c) Decision (Majority) 3 5:00 Shooto: Back To Our Roots 8 [a]
Bantamweight Masakatsu Ueda def. Koetsu Okazaki Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00 Shooto: Back To Our Roots 8 [b]
Lightweight Takashi Nakakura def. Ganjo Tentsuku Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00 Shooto: Shooto Tradition 1 [c]
Flyweight Shinichi Kojima (c) def. Mamoru Yamaguchi Submission (Guillotine Choke) 3 3:42 Shooto: Shooto Tradition 2 [d]
Bantamweight Masakatsu Ueda (c) vs. Marcos Galvao Draw 3 5:00 Shooto: Shooto Tradition 3 [e]
Featherweight Takeshi Inoue def. Hideki Kadowaki (c) Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00 Shooto: Shooto Tradition 4 [f]
  1. ^ For the Featherweight Championship.
  2. ^ For the Bantamweight Championship.
  3. ^ For the Lightweight Championship.
  4. ^ For the Flyweight Championship.
  5. ^ For the Bantamweight Championship.
  6. ^ For the Featherweight Championship.

Shooto: Back To Our Roots 7

[edit]

Shooto: Back To Our Roots 7[1] was an event held on January 26, 2008 at Korakuen Hall in Tokyo, Japan.
